author: Siliconera
text:
Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World Voice Actors and DLC Detailed
Square Enix shared English Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World voice actors, DLC details, and screenshots.

author: Siliconera
text:
New NieR: Automata 2B and 9S Charms Connect to Each Other
The new NieR: Automata acrylic charms can be used as personal markers or keychains and feature 2B and 9S.

author: Siliconera
text:
Tifa Becomes a Biker With FFVII Ever Crisis Rider Jacket and Gloves
The new FFVII Ever Crisis banner involves a biker costume for Tifa that gives her a Rider Jacket and Riding Gloves.

author: Siliconera
text:
Pokemon Center Selling Pet Accessories and Toys
The new Pokemon Playful Partners merchandise line features pet accessories like toys, collars, bowls, and beds.

author: Siliconera
text:
1.0 Tales of Seikyu Adds New Romance Options and Marriage
Now that the 1.0 patch for Tales of Seikyu is live, you can get married to one of 10 romance options and see the full story.

author: Siliconera
text:
Animal Crossing: New Horizons Switch 2 Cases Coming
Even more Animal Crossing: New Horizons Switch 2 cases are on the way that feature major characters from the game.

author: Siliconera
text:
Trails from Zero and to Azure Switch 2 and PS5 Release Dates Set
The Fall 2026 release dates are set for the Switch 2 and PS5 copies of the JRPGs Trails from Zero and Trails to Azure.

author: Siliconera
text:
Danganronpa 2 Zozotown Merchandise Pre-Orders Opened
The products will be delivered in mid-November 2026.

author: Siliconera
text:
FFVII Revelation Might Get Post-Game DLC
It depends on user interest.

author: Siliconera
text:
Review: Lover’s Enigma Starts Strong
Lover’s Enigma is a great game for folks who are looking for a dark, unsettling mystery with a touch of romance.

author: Siliconera
text:
Deltarune Chapters 6 and 7 Updates Shared
Deltarune Chapter 5 is out this month, Chapter 6 is progressing well, and development might start on Chapter 7 in 2026.

author: Siliconera
text:
Demo for Sword Art Online Game Echoes of Aincrad Confirmed
We'll see what the new Sword Art Online game is like soon as an Echoes of Aincrad demo will be out in June.

author: Siliconera
text:
Dead or Alive 6 PC Version Being Delisted on Steam
Today is the last day to get Dead or Alive 6 on Steam for the PC before it is delisted ahead of the Last Round release.

author: Siliconera
text:
FFVII Remake Survive Said the Prophet Music Video Launches
Survive Said the Prophet shared a brief cover and music video of the FFVII Remake song "Hollow" worldwide.

author: Siliconera
text:
Digimon Story Time Stranger Switch and Switch 2 Demo Debuts
Both Switch and Switch 2 players can see how Digimon Story Time Stranger runs with a new demo out on both platforms.
